caption: The video showcases a modern, well-lit kitchen with a sleek and contemporary design. The kitchen features dark wooden cabinets with glass-fronted upper cabinets, providing a stylish contrast to the light-colored countertops. A large island with a built-in gas stove and a red kettle on it serves as the focal point of the space. Above the stove, a stainless steel range hood is installed, adding functionality and a modern touch. The backsplash is adorned with small, square tiles in neutral tones, complementing the overall color scheme. In the background, a dining area with a long table and chairs is visible, along with a living room area featuring a brown sofa and large windows draped with curtains, allowing natural light to flood the space. The video captures the spacious and inviting atmosphere of this open-plan living area.
